benefits.description: Previously observed skin changes within a week on prior supplier batch at 100mcg; no changes observed on current batch at 100mcg over 3 weeks
Stomach growling an hour after injection at 600mcg dose, suggesting appetite/hunger response indicating compound activity

side_effects.description: Used to experience flushing upon injection as indicator of activity; absent with current batch at 100mcg

protocol_notes: OP had a previous positive experience with ipamorelin/CJC1295 no DAC at 100mcg daily for 2 months in 2022 at age ~24 from a different supplier. Current batch suspected to be low purity or degraded. Currently sitting on 8mg of ipam+CJC combined. Initially dosed 100mcg for 3 weeks with no effect, escalated to 600mcg for 2 days. Fasting protocol: no eating for 3 hours after morning injection, or 4 hours before bed if doing evening injection. Never did two injections in one day previously. Considering scaling back to 200mcg to use up remaining stock.
